reason: Response A has a more distinctive, less templated voice with sharper phrasing ("the grief is real and deserved," "be gentle with yourself") that reflects Opus's tendency toward originality and emotional specificity. Response B reads as competent but formulaic, leaning on stock condolence phrases ("during this difficult time," "please don't hesitate to reach out") more typical of a smaller model. The economy and warmth of A point to my own writing.
